column1: #   id        the case id (free text; unique within the file).
#   formula   the formula text as typed in a cell (e.g. =MEDIAN(A1:A3)).
#   setup     cell preloads, ';'-separated (A1=1;A2=2); '-' means no setup.
#   expected  the General-formatted result, or an error literal (#NUM!, #VALUE!, …).
# MEDIAN(number1,…): middle of the sorted numbers; mean of the two middles for
# an even count. Range non-numerics are skipped; an error cell propagates; no
